free_text: Total yield measurements in Al-27(p,gamma)Si-28
3 MeV electrostatic accelerator was
used.
Beam currents were ~ 0.3 mu-A.
Two unshielded Harshaw NaI crystal, 12.7 cm
diameter * 10.2 cm long 12.7*10.2 cm and 10.2 cm
diameter * 10.2 cm long 10.2*10.2 cm, were positioned
on the two sides of the target chamber; their
containers were separated by 13.5 mm.
Targets were prepared from spectrographically analysed
aluminium (>99.99%) evaporated in vacuum onto 0.25 mm
tantalum blanks from directly-heated tantalum boats.
Both the target blanks and boat were outgassed at
temperatures above red heat in vacuum prior to the
evaporation. The target used was of 7.5 keV thickness
for 1 MeV protons.
SD: Correction in Subent 002.
Upper limit to nonresonant cross section is given.
Figs 6 from Nucl.Phys.,A130(1969)1
SD: DATA -> DATA-MAX.
Data are given as number of counts * 10**3/integration.
Fig.6
